message:
🚀 Update and publish alpha.126 with fixed dependencies

- Updated version to 2.0.0-alpha.126
- Fixed commander dependency issue by moving to dependencies
- Successfully published to npm registry
- Verified installation and functionality via npx
- CLI working properly with version and help commands

🎯 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
